notes: Baseline captured 2026-05-07 from heuristics-only detector. Measured FP-rate was 0.0093 (5 FPs across 539 benigns); floor set at 0.0100 with ~7%% slack. Floor is intentionally tight: any future change that adds even a couple of new false positives will require either fixing the regression or updating this floor with justification. recall_floor left null while the heuristic suite is still being tuned (see corpus_notes.md).
